issues.description: DrawCard action missing required condition: 'if you have 7 or more DON!! cards on your field and 5 or less cards in your hand'. Current condition is 'Always' which applies to the entire effect, but the draw should only trigger if both conditions are met.
Orphaned second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and GiveDon action has no basis in card text. This effect should not exist.
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is correct for the power boost, but the overall condition structure is incorrect due to the missing conditional logic on the draw action.
